summary: Comprehensive backend testing of Tortellino API. All 22 pytest tests passed (100%). Verified JWT auth (admin seed + login, wrong password 401, register duplicate 400, /me with/without token), role-based access (student cannot POST /api/lessons -> 403), full lessons CRUD with exercise IDs preserved on update, progress/answer for multiple_choice, true_false, open_answer (case-insensitive), idempotent XP (already_solved=true and xp_awarded=0 on repeat), wrong answer gives 0 XP, complete-lesson updates streak/last_active_date, level thresholds exactly match spec (50 XP -> Lv2, 150 XP -> Lv3, 250 XP -> Lv4), saved-question add/list/delete. Admin auto-seed verified in backend logs. No MongoDB _id leakage observed in responses.

minor.issue: Password min_length=6 enforced but no complexity/uniqueness validation on name; acceptable for MVP
Accepts client-supplied xp_earned/correct_count without server recomputation; client could inflate stats (not used to mutate XP on server, so low risk, but stored as-is if persisted)
Uses query params (not body) which is fine but inconsistent with POST /api/saved that uses JSON body

action_items: Optional: server-side recomputation of xp_earned in /api/progress/complete-lesson to prevent client tampering
Frontend smoke testing not performed in this pass (backend-only per request). Main agent may want to request a frontend pass next.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 550 lines and acceptable — under 700-line threshold, well-structured with clear sections.
CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True — browsers reject this combination. Since auth is Bearer-based (not cookies), it works, but consider explicit origin list for production.
Passwords hashed with bcrypt ($2b$) ✓, JWT secret from env ✓, DB_NAME from env ✓, no hardcoded URLs ✓.
Admin seed is idempotent and updates password if changed ✓.
Exercise IDs preserved on lesson update by positional match — good for saved_questions integrity.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST-prefixed lessons and test_*@test.com students during run; TEST lessons are deleted in cleanup. A few test students remain in DB (not cleaned, but isolated via unique UUID emails).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. Frontend (Expo) was not tested this iteration. Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_tortellino_api.py as regression suite. Admin login: lorenzopasqualot@gmail.com / Tortellino2026!. All endpoints require Bearer JWT except /api/, /api/auth/register, /api/auth/login.
